top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(y.Consumption) AS average_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(y.Consumption) AS average_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(y.Consumption) AS average_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013';

WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'

JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
